input.placeholder: Say something… (Enter to send · Shift+Enter newline · drop or paste files)
input.attachHint: Attach local file (or drop / paste an image)

session.deleteBody: The session will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
session.empty: No sessions yet. Click above to create one.

cwd.label: Working directory (optional)
cwd.hint1: Agent will read and write files in this directory. Absolute path required, must exist.
cwd.hint2: Leave blank to use the daemon's startup directory.
cwd.invalidAbsolute: Working directory must be an absolute path

newDialog.title: New chat
newDialog.titlePlaceholder: Leave blank to auto-generate from first message

preview.unsupported: This file type cannot be previewed inline.

empty.heading: Chat 💬
empty.hint1: Click "New chat" above to start a session, or just type below to auto-create one.
empty.hint2: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline · streaming output

errors.stillStreaming: The previous message is still streaming; wait for it or cancel.
errors.tooManyConcurrent: Up to {{max}} concurrent chat sessions can stream at once. Wait for others to finish or cancel them.
errors.fileTooLargeBody: Per-file limit is 50 MB; current {{size}} MB ({{name}})
